PRETRIAL MOTION, DEPT. 212. PLAINTIFF CARL JONES' MOTION NTC, DECLARATION AND POINTS & AUTHORITIES REQUESTING VACATING ORDER IMPOSING SANCTIONS IS SCHEDULED THIS DAY. THERE BEING NO APPEARANCE OR AN OBJECTION TENTATIVE RULING TO GRANT MOTION IS ADOPTED. MOTION IS ORDERED GRANTED. SANCTIONS ARE ORDERED VACATED. MINI MINUTES: Plaintiff Carl Jones' Motion NTC, Declaration and Points & Authorities requesting vacating order imposing sanctions is scheduled this day. There being no appearance or an objection tentative ruling to grant motion is adopted. Motion is ordered granted. Sanctions are ordered vacated. Moving party to submit a proposed order within five days. Proceedings reported by: David Davenport (212)
